title: Orchestration State v4
description: Canonical schema for the orchestration system's v4 state format.

$schema.title: Schema Version
$schema.description: Schema version identifier. Must be orchestration-state-v4.

name.title: Project Name
name.description: Unique project identifier derived from the project directory name.

created.title: Created Timestamp
created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the project was initialized.

updated.title: Updated Timestamp
updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last state mutation.

pipeline.title: Pipeline State
pipeline.description: Current pipeline execution state and configuration.

current_tier.title: Current Tier
current_tier.description: Active pipeline tier. Values: planning, execution, review, complete, halted.

gate_mode.title: Gate Mode
gate_mode.description: Human gate frequency override, or null to use config default. Values: task, phase, autonomous.

source_control.title: Source Control Settings
source_control.description: Source control configuration for this project, set during initialization.

branch.title: Feature Branch
branch.description: Git branch name used for the project's code changes.

base_branch.title: Base Branch
base_branch.description: Git branch to merge into when the pull request is created.

worktree_path.title: Worktree Path
worktree_path.description: Absolute path to the git worktree directory for this project.

auto_commit.title: Auto Commit Mode
auto_commit.description: Controls when commits are made automatically. Values: always, never.

auto_pr.title: Auto PR Mode
auto_pr.description: Controls when pull requests are created automatically. Values: always, never.

remote_url.title: Remote URL
remote_url.description: URL of the remote repository, or null if not configured.

compare_url.title: Compare URL
compare_url.description: URL to compare the feature branch against base branch, or null.

pr_url.title: Pull Request URL
pr_url.description: URL of the created pull request, or null if not yet created.

planning.title: Planning State
planning.description: Planning pipeline tier state and document tracking.

status.title: Planning Status
status.description: Current status of the planning tier. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete.

human_approved.title: Planning Human Approved
human_approved.description: When true, a human has approved the planning output.

steps.title: Planning Steps
steps.description: Ordered list of planning document steps.

name.title: Step Name
name.description: Planning step identifier. Values: research, prd, design, architecture, master_plan.

status.title: Step Status
status.description: Current status of this planning step. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete.

doc_path.title: Step Document Path
doc_path.description: Relative path to the planning step document, or null if not yet created.

execution.title: Execution State
execution.description: Execution pipeline tier state, phases, and task tracking.

status.title: Execution Status
status.description: Current status of the execution tier. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete, halted.

current_phase.title: Current Phase Index
current_phase.description: 1-based index of the active phase. Zero means no phase is active.

status.title: Phase Status
status.description: Current status of this phase. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete, halted.

stage.title: Phase Stage
stage.description: Active workflow stage for this phase. Values: planning, executing, reviewing, complete, failed.

current_task.title: Current Task Index
current_task.description: 1-based index of the active task in this phase. Zero means no task is active.

tasks.title: Phase Tasks
tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks in this phase.

status.title: Task Status
status.description: Current status of this task. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete, failed, halted.

stage.title: Task Stage
stage.description: Active workflow stage for this task. Values: planning, coding, reviewing, complete, failed.

docs.title: Task Documents
docs.description: Paths to the task handoff and code review documents.

handoff.title: Task Handoff Path
handoff.description: Relative path to the task handoff document, or null if not yet created.

review.title: Task Review Path
review.description: Relative path to the code review document, or null if not yet created.

review.title: Task Review
review.description: Code review verdict and resulting action for this task.

verdict.title: Task Review Verdict
verdict.description: Code review outcome. Values: approved, changes_requested, rejected, or null.

action.title: Task Review Action
action.description: Pipeline action after code review. Values: advanced, corrective_task_issued, halted, or null.

retries.title: Task Retry Count
retries.description: Number of times this task has been retried. Minimum: 0.

commit_hash.title: Task Commit Hash
commit_hash.description: Git commit hash for this task's code, or null if not yet committed.

docs.title: Phase Documents
docs.description: Paths to the phase plan, report, and review documents.

phase_plan.title: Phase Plan Path
phase_plan.description: Relative path to the phase plan document, or null if not yet created.

phase_report.title: Phase Report Path
phase_report.description: Relative path to the phase report document, or null if not yet created.

phase_review.title: Phase Review Path
phase_review.description: Relative path to the phase review document, or null if not yet created.

review.title: Phase Review
review.description: Phase review verdict and resulting action for this phase.

verdict.title: Phase Review Verdict
verdict.description: Phase review outcome. Values: approved, changes_requested, rejected, or null.

action.title: Phase Review Action
action.description: Pipeline action after phase review. Values: advanced, corrective_tasks_issued, halted, or null.

final_review.title: Final Review State
final_review.description: Final review tier state and approval tracking.

status.title: Final Review Status
status.description: Current status of the final review. Values: not_started, in_progress, complete.

doc_path.title: Review Document Path
doc_path.description: Relative path to the final review document, or null if not yet created.

human_approved.title: Final Review Human Approved
human_approved.description: When true, a human has approved the final review.

config.title: Config Snapshot
config.description: Runtime configuration captured at project initialization.

limits.title: Config Limits
limits.description: Pipeline scope guards snapshotted from orchestration.yml.

max_phases.title: Max Phases
max_phases.description: Maximum number of phases allowed per project. Minimum: 1.

max_tasks_per_phase.title: Max Tasks per Phase
max_tasks_per_phase.description: Maximum number of tasks allowed per phase. Minimum: 1.

max_retries_per_task.title: Max Retries per Task
max_retries_per_task.description: Auto-retries before escalation to human. Minimum: 0.

max_consecutive_review_rejections.title: Max Consecutive Review Rejections
max_consecutive_review_rejections.description: Consecutive reviewer rejections before human escalation. Minimum: 1.

human_gates.title: Human Gates
human_gates.description: Human gate defaults snapshotted from orchestration.yml.

after_planning.title: Gate After Planning
after_planning.description: When true, a human gate is required after planning completes.

execution_mode.title: Execution Mode
execution_mode.description: Human gate frequency during execution. Values: ask, phase, task, autonomous.

after_final_review.title: Gate After Final Review
after_final_review.description: When true, a human gate is required after final review completes.
